seoTitle: Beaufort River vs Beckenham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beaufort River and Beckenham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Beaufort River vs Beckenham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaufort River and Beckenham.
heading: Beaufort River vs Beckenham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaufort River, Western Australia and Beckenham, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beckenham has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Beaufort River (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaufort River or Beckenham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaufort River has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Beckenham scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaufort River scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Beckenham scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaufort River or Beckenham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beckenham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
